criteria.label: Place Anthropic founding (~2021) and Constitutional AI on a simple timeline.
criteria.example: 2021: founded. 2022: Constitutional AI research prominence. 2023: wider Claude API + claude.ai.

criteria.label: Explain why founders emphasized safety alongside scaling (one sentence).
criteria.example: As LLMs scaled, deployment risks grew quickly—safety research needed to co-evolve with capability.

criteria.label: Name two post-2023 ecosystem shifts and who they mattered for.
criteria.example: Cloud partnerships (enterprise buyers on Bedrock/Vertex paths) and developer tools (Console, SDKs, Claude Code for builders).

criteria.label: Correct one historical misconception with a dated milestone.
criteria.example: Myth: Anthropic shipped mass-market chat at founding. Reality: founded 2021; wider Claude API + claude.ai adoption followed in the 2022–2023 window.
